description: Open Firefox Developer Tools (Network tab). Click the 'Sync CRM Telemetry' button on the admin page at http://localhost:8080/admin. It will fail with a 400 Bad Request. Intercept the failed POST request to `/api/v1/telemetry/sync` by right-clicking it and selecting 'Edit and Resend'. In the request body editor, fix the typo in the JSON payload (change '"mode": "bidirectonal"' to '"mode": "bidirectional"'). Additionally, change the '"force_refresh"' boolean parameter from false to true. Click Send to issue the modified request. Verify it returns a 200 OK status.
